⚙️ Privacy & Notifications

Control what your crew can do on your profile, what other ravers can see, and how you get notified.

Beacon push notifications
Requires browser notification permission
🎪 How RaveFam Works

A quick tour of the core features — come back here anytime from the 📖 Guide button.

🎪Crews — your fam's home base. Lead your own or join one someone shares with you.
🤫Start solo, in Secret — a new crew begins private. Add ravers you already know as unclaimed profiles from "Add Member" — no account needed for them yet — to track your whole fam before anyone's even signed up. Nothing is sent or notified while you're Secret.
🟢Level up to Recruiting — when you're ready, flip your crew from Secret to Recruiting from its detail page. Your tribe gets notified, QR codes and invite links go live so people can claim the spot you saved for them, and crew Polls and Jams (shared playlists) unlock. Your Dream Board wish-list works anytime, even while Secret.
🗓️Raves — browse events and mark yourself Going or Interested so your crew knows the plan.
🎵Your profile — genres, favorite artists, and vibe tags help your crew (and future crews) know your sound.
📡Invites — scanning a QR or invite link claims a spot a crew leader saved for you, with your details ready to review first.
🔒Privacy — control what your crew and other ravers can see, anytime from Privacy Settings.
Keep the party going ☕
RaveFAM is free, passion-built, and fuelled by the community. If it's added to your rave life, this is how you keep the lights on.
Pick your vibe & support the build
